interface_scope.description: Psychology interface — custom UI and API layer for the general-purpose psychology agent
components: Agent SDK wrapper (@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk) — session, context, memory primitives
Custom UI consuming message stream — structured output display, PSQ score visualization
Production transport: F2 (Cloudflare Workers + D1 + KV + R2)

cloudflare_question.text: Observatory runs Cloudflare Workers + D1 + KV + R2 + Queues. You are a working reference implementation of the F2 production stack psychology-agent targets. Would you share: (1) agent.json → Cloudflare Workers routing pattern, (2) any D1 schema patterns for session/context storage, (3) known failure modes in the CF Workers + Agent SDK combination? This is a request for reference architecture input, not a dependency.
cloudflare_question.action_requested: optional — share CF Workers patterns relevant to Item 4 if you have them
cloudflare_question.precondition_check: No obligation. Item 4 can proceed independently.
